name: fasolakia lathera
instructions: saute yellow onion in a generous amount of olive oil. add garlic. add green beans, carrots, potatoes, canned tomatoes, salt, pepper, and water to barely cover. braise covered ~45 min until everything is very tender — green beans should be soft, not al dente (that's the whole point of lathera). finish with parsley and dill.
notes: greek 'lathera' (oily) braise — olive oil is both medium and flavor, don't skimp. green beans are not supposed to be crunchy.
